name: RPG HUNGER GAMES
description:
Fire is catching. And if We burn, You'll burn with Us.

In the world of Panem you find yourself part of the Reaping. Now you have to fight to survive, doinf what ever it takes. But at what cost?

Based on my bots you can probably tell I'm a booktok girly. In the name of justice, i felt like I needed to make this bot.

UPDATE:

After playing through this bot of mine i can fully say... its a bit clunky in some places, you can redirect it to the best of your ability like i did. Or you can go on a weird acid trip, your choice.
creator: 01ECHO10
